pr_text:
## Title: Fix PUSCH timing advance estimation by processing both DMRS symbols

### Summary
The RU uplink processing procedure was incorrectly extracting and processing only a single DMRS symbol for PUSCH channel estimation. This incomplete processing led to inaccurate timing advance calculations and violated the expected 3GPP signaling flow for uplink synchronization. According to 3GPP specifications, both DMRS symbols within a slot should be processed to enable proper channel interpolation and
